telegramText: MARKET WRAP — May 8, 2026 Markets reflected cautious optimism as crypto's AI infrastructure pivot drove bitcoin above $80k while USD weakness ahead of CPI data lifted risk assets. The displacement theme gained momentum as traditional late-cycle dynamics evolved, though muted VIX suggests investors remain selective rather than euphoric. CLOSING PRICES BTC: $80,102 · ETH: $2,306 · SOL: $92.08 · GOLD: $4,724 · SPY: $737.62 (+0.5%) · QQQ: $711.23 (+2.2%) · VIX: $17.19 (+0.6%) · TLT: $86.08 (+0.0%) · DXY: $97.84 (-0.4%) · OIL: $94.68 (-0.1%) EVENING NEWS ▼ TeraWulf's AI Compute Revenue Outpaces Bitcoin Mining Amid $427 Million Loss ▲ Fed Calls Risks Tied to Private Credit Redemptions ‘Manageable’ ▲ BitMine Stock Faces Risk as Tom Lee Cools on Ethereum Buying ▼ Forecasting the upcoming week: US Dollar weakens ahead of key US CPI data and Fed speeches ▲ Hungary: Inflation path stays contained – ING — Is Regis Resources (ASX:RRL) Still Attractive After Its Strong Three Year Share Price Run SCENARIO SHIFTS ▲ Late Cycle: USD weakness and crypto infrastructure evolution signal mature cycle dynamics ▲ Goldilocks: Dollar weakness and contained inflation in Hungary support soft landing thesis ▼ Stagflation: USD weakness reduces stagflation probability ahead of CPI data ▲ Displacement: AI infrastructure displacing traditional crypto mining models accelerates REGIME CHECK ▲ Risk-On · Neutral · EXPANSION · Gauge: 32.5/100 UPCOMING — HIGH IMPACT Total retail sales of consumer goods (YoY)(Apr) — May 18, 02:00 AM UTC (prev: 1.7%) US Federal Funds Benchmark Rate — May 15, 07:00 PM UTC (prev: 3.50% - 3.75%) US Retail sales (MoM)(Apr) — May 14, 12:30 PM UTC (prev: 1.7%) US Unseasonally Adjusted Consumer Price Index (YoY)(Apr) — May 13, 06:30 PM UTC (prev: 3.3%) US EIA crude oil inventory transmutation last week (10,000 barrels)(to 0508) — May 13, 02:30 PM UTC (prev: -231.3) US Producer Price Index (YoY)(Apr) — May 13, 12:30 PM UTC (prev: 4.0%) CONTRARIAN • TeraWulf's AI pivot success might mask fundamental Bitcoin mining oversupply that could trigger sect • Fed's sanguine view on private credit risks could be mistimed as redemption pressures haven't been t agentcanary.ai | Not financial advice
